_comment: Cartas de Reliquia de TI4. Fuente: PDF Player Components (oficial). Las reliquias NO pueden ser comerciadas entre jugadores. Se obtienen purgando 3 relic fragments del mismo tipo, o por efectos específicos.

rules.obtaining: Se obtienen purgando 3 relic fragments que sean del mismo tipo, o combinando fragments de color con Unknown Relic Fragments (grises), ya que estos últimos cuentan como cualquier tipo. Ejemplo: 2 cultural + 1 unknown = válido para obtener una reliquia. También se pueden obtener mediante cartas o habilidades específicas.
rules.trading: Las reliquias NO pueden ser comerciadas.

relics.name: Dominus Orb
relics.effect: Before you move units during a tactical action, you may purge this card to move and transport units that are in systems that contain 1 of your command tokens.

relics.name: Maw of Worlds
relics.effect: At the start of the agenda phase, you may purge this card and exhaust all of your planets to gain any 1 technology.

relics.name: Scepter of Emelpar
relics.effect: When you would spend a token from your strategy pool, you may exhaust this card to spend a token from your reinforcements instead.

relics.name: Shard of the Throne
relics.effect: When you gain this card, gain 1 victory point. When you lose this card, lose 1 victory point. When a player gains control of a legendary planet you control, or a planet you control in your home system, that player gains this card.

relics.name: Stellar Converter
relics.effect: ACTION: Choose 1 non-home, non-legendary planet other than Mecatol Rex in a system that is adjacent to 1 or more of your units that have BOMBARDMENT; destroy all units on that planet and purge its attachments and its planet card. Then, place the destroyed planet token on that planet and purge this card.

relics.name: The Codex
relics.effect: ACTION: Purge this card to take up to 3 action cards of your choice from the action card discard pile.

relics.name: The Crown of Emphidia
relics.effect: After you perform a tactical action, you may exhaust this card to explore 1 planet you control. At the end of the status phase, if you control the 'Tomb of Emphidia' attachment, you may purge this card to gain 1 Victory Point.

relics.name: The Crown of Thalnos
relics.effect: During each combat round, this card's owner may reroll any number of their dice, applying +1 to the results; any units that reroll dice but do not produce at least 1 hit are destroyed.

relics.name: The Obsidian
relics.effect: When you gain this card, draw 1 secret objective. You can have 1 additional scored or unscored secret objective.

relics.name: The Prophet's Tears
relics.effect: When you research a technology, you may exhaust this card to ignore 1 prerequisite or draw 1 action card.

relics.name: Dynamo Core (exhaust)
relics.effect: While this card is in your play area, your commodity value is increased by 2. ACTION: Purge this card to gain trade goods equal to your printed commodity value +2.
relics._note: Hay dos versiones de Dynamo Core en el PDF (dos entradas distintas con efectos similares pero diferentes en el timing de purga). Ambas están incluidas.

relics.name: Dynamo Core (gain)
relics.effect: While this card is in your play area, your commodity value is increased by 2. ACTION: Gain trade goods equal to your commodity value then purge this card.

relics.name: JR-XS4 55-0
relics.effect: ACTION: Exhaust this agent and choose a player; that player may spend 3 resources to place a structure on a planet they control. If they do not, they gain 1 trade good.

relics.name: Nano-Forge (attach)
relics.effect: ACTION: Attach this card to a non-legendary, non-home planet you control; its resource and influence values are increased by 2 and it is a legendary planet.

relics.name: Nano-Forge (no repeat)
relics.effect: ACTION: Attach this card to a non-legendary, non-home planet you control; its resource and influence values are increased by 2 and it is a legendary planet. This action cannot be performed once attached.

relics.name: Circlet of the Void
relics.effect: Your units do not roll for gravity rifts, and you ignore the movement effects of other anomalies. ACTION: Exhaust this card to explore a frontier token in a system that does not contain any other players' ships.

relics.name: Book of Latvinia
relics.effect: When you gain this card, research up to 2 technologies that have no prerequisites. ACTION: Purge this card; if you control planets that have all 4 types of technology specialties, gain 1 victory point. Otherwise, gain the speaker token.

relics.name: Neuraloop
relics.effect: When a public objective is revealed, you may purge one of your relics to discard that objective and replace it with a random objective from any objective deck; that objective is a public objective, even if it is a secret objective.

relics.name: Metali Void Armaments
relics.effect: During the 'Anti Fighter Barrage' step of space combat, you may resolve ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE 6 (X3) against your opponent's units.

relics.name: The Quantumcore
relics.effect: When you gain this card, gain your breakthrough. You have SYNERGY for all technology types.

relics.name: The Silver Flame
relics.effect: The Silver Flame may be exchanged as part of a transaction. ACTION: Roll 1 die and purge this card; if the result is a 10, gain 1 victory point. Otherwise, purge your home system and all units in it; you cannot score public objectives. Put the Fracture into play if it is not already.

relics.name: Lightrail Ordnance
relics.effect: Your space docks gain SPACE CANNON 5 (X2). You may use your space dock's SPACE CANNON against ships that are adjacent to their system.

relics.name: Metali Void Shielding
relics.effect: Each time hits are produced against 1 of your non-fighter ships, 1 of those ships may use SUSTAIN DAMAGE as if it had that ability.

relics.name: The Triad
relics.effect: This card can be readied and spent as if it were a planet card. Its resource and influence values are equal to 3 plus the number of different types of relic fragments you own.

relics.name: Heart of Ixth
relics.effect: After any die is rolled, you may exhaust this card to add or subtract 1 from its results.
